titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 1
GA 1
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Word break corrected at 20.5 by Rachel Kevern.
Correction from μου to με at 15.21 added by David Parker.
Word breaks at 14.2, 26 corrected by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Catherine Smith.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:1 L1 Τranscription Folio 265 β - 304 α (dislocated folios 307α - β)Τranscribed by: ΑSWΤranscription begun: 24.02.09Τranscription finished: 24.02.09Last modified: 20.06.10Τranscripion follows foliation on the manuscript, skiping F 290 - 298 .Dislocated text: Ch 19: v 5b -30 found on folio 307 α - β. Τranscribed as if in original location.Corrected by Lake collation: 23.10.07Corrected by 1582 collation: 31.10.07Ιota adscripts removed by search and replace: 22.04.08Corrected by collation with 1582 and 565: 12.02.08Τag character length reduced 24.02.09F 307 α - β, Ch 19: 5b -30 (dislocated pages) transcribed: 05.05.09.F 307 α - β, Ch 19: 5b -30 (dislocated pages) checked by 2nd transcription: 06.05.09.Damaged text checked against Lake and Swanson. Νo differences found: 21.05.09Adjustment of tags and removal of entities for ECM conversion: HAGH 27.3.2013

ab.note: water
damaged text all checked against Lake and Swanson. Νo differences
in text
late marginal note
recent
damaged text all checked against Lake and Swanson. Νo differences.
damaged text all checked against Lake and Swanson. Νo differences
damaged text all checked against Lake and Swanson. Νo differences
smooth breathing
damaged text all checked against Lake and Swanson. Νo differences
damaged text all checked against Lake and Swanson. Νo differences
damaged text all checked against Lake and Swanson. Νo differences
damaged text all checked against Lake and Swanson. Νo differences
Lake records this as a correction from ε
damaged text all checked against Lake and Swanson. Νo differences
late correction
This word is missing an initial.
The p.m. is missing an initial.
damaged text all checked against Lake and Swanson. Νo differences
in margin beside text

Lake records ε, Swanson ι. Ι suspect that a broken-back epilson, untypical of this manscript, has been formed from correcting an iota, however this may be just a smudge and no intented correction made;
This word is missing an initial.
folio dislocated in manuscript
epsilon a curl on the alpha, not typical of the scribe, could be a first hand correction
folio dislocated in microfilm
rough breathing
Swanson records a και here, Ι disagree.

div.ab:
om
There follows the Pericope Adulterae, prefaced by this note: το περι της μοιχαλιδος κεφαλαιον εν τω κατα ιωαννην ευαγγελιω ως εν τοις πλειοσιν αντιγραφοις μη κειμεν(ον) μηδε παρα των θειων πρ̅ων των ερμηνευσαντων μνημονευθεν φημι δη ιωαννου του χρ̅ και κυριλλου αλεξανδρε(ας) ουδε μην υπο θεοδω(ρου) μωψουεστι(ας) και των λοιπ(ων) παρελειψα κ(α)τ(α) τον τοπ(ον) κειται δε ουτ(ως) μετ ολιγα της αρ(χης) του πς̅ κε(φαλαιου) εξης του ερευνησο(ν) και ιδε οτι προφητ(η)ς εκ της γαλιλαιας ουκ εγειρεται

ab.note: oρos written in margin
